meaning: vt.鎯虫湜,鏈熸湜,甯屾湜,璇锋眰(瀹樻柟涓堢ぜ)n.鎰挎湜,蹇冩効,瑕佹眰v.瑕佹眰
examples: We all desire health and happiness.
He was overestimating their desire for peace.
This condition decreases sexual desire and responsiveness.
Inspired by a desire to sleep indoors rather than on a park bench, I called her.
Unless our desire to rebuild is fierce, Young says the country will suffer a gaping cultural hole.
